name: Padded Armor
notes: Stealth Disadvantage • Dex: Yes • light armor that sets AC as 11 + Dex modifier and stays flexible for agile movement.

name: Leather Armor
notes: Stealth: No Disadvantage • Dex: Yes • light armor that sets AC as 11 + Dex modifier and stays flexible for agile movement.

name: Studded Leather
notes: Stealth: No Disadvantage • Dex: Yes • light armor that sets AC as 12 + Dex modifier and stays flexible for agile movement.

name: Hide
notes: Stealth: No Disadvantage • Dex: Max 2 • medium armor that sets AC as 12 + Dex modifier (max 2) and balances protection and mobility.

name: Chain Shirt
notes: Stealth: No Disadvantage • Dex: Max 2 • medium armor that sets AC as 13 + Dex modifier (max 2) and balances protection and mobility.

name: Scale Mail
notes: Stealth Disadvantage • Dex: Max 2 • medium armor that sets AC as 14 + Dex modifier (max 2) and balances protection and mobility.

name: Breastplate
notes: Stealth: No Disadvantage • Dex: Max 2 • medium armor that sets AC as 14 + Dex modifier (max 2) and balances protection and mobility.

name: Half Plate
notes: Stealth Disadvantage • Dex: Max 2 • medium armor that sets AC as 15 + Dex modifier (max 2) and balances protection and mobility.

name: Ring Mail
notes: Stealth Disadvantage • Dex: No • heavy armor that sets AC as 14 and leans into heavier full-body protection.

name: Chain Mail
notes: Stealth Disadvantage • Dex: No • heavy armor that sets AC as 16 and expects Strength 13 and leans into heavier full-body protection.

name: Splint
notes: Stealth Disadvantage • Dex: No • heavy armor that sets AC as 17 and expects Strength 15 and leans into heavier full-body protection.

name: Plate
notes: Stealth Disadvantage • Dex: No • heavy armor that sets AC as 18 and expects Strength 15 and leans into heavier full-body protection.

name: Shield
notes: Stealth: No Disadvantage • Dex: Unchanged • Shield that adds +2 AC while carried in hand.
